revision_rule: TItle block within the dwg is the only way to find out the revision. Some drawings have an excel sheet that lists all the drawings and the latest revisions. but this isnt all of them and should be used. its a very specific file. Use title block in paper space
plot_defaults: DWG to PDF - every autocad has this.
error_policy: retry then continue - then LOG  in a user friend list in the UI
ui_mode: minimal one-window - best i guess would be to work from within autocad.
max_retry: 2 - claudecode create LISP for autocad. you should review the autocad local folder and review the none standard lisp one of them does revisions!
